title: POV: Home From School, One More Dunk
hook_3s: POV crash onto the bed — phone flips up, thumb taps, ball swishes through a neon magenta hoop on beat one.
scene_flow: 0–3s: Live-action POV — backpack drops, person flops face-first onto bed holding phone vertical, screen fills frame.
3–6s: Hard cut into Flappy Dunk gameplay — tap-tap-tap rhythm, ball arcs through three magenta hoops in a row, combo counter explodes.
6–10s: VS matchmaking screen flashes, opponent's score creeps up; thumb taps faster, hearts indicator flickers down to 1.
10–13s: Clutch swish at the buzzer, score flips to WIN, confetti burst in beige + blue + magenta.
13–15s: End card — game logo, CTA pulse, thumb tap reveals 'Play Free'.
visual_direction: Open with grainy phone-camera live action (warm bedroom light to bridge into the #EAD5A0 beige) then snap into pure Flappy Dunk 2D cartoon: thick black outlines, flat shading, #D81155 magenta hoops and banners, #5CB3FF blue ball trail and combo bursts. Keep the bridge frame matched in color temperature so the cut feels seamless. All gameplay UI must be authentic Flappy Dunk chrome — top-center score, hearts row, combo multiplier, VS portraits.
rationale: Voodoo's current Flappy Dunk rotation leans on generic "best basketball game" video and a static playable — zero UGC/POV creative in market. This brief imports the trending Gen Z POV-flop hook but reframes it around the dunk-rhythm core loop and VS tension, giving UA a fresh CTR-driver to A/B against the tired "Best basketball game ever" copy. Run as a 10–15% budget probe on TikTok/Admob; if CTR lifts >20% vs control, scale.
scenario_prompts: Authentic Flappy Dunk in-game vertical screenshot, aspect 9:16, 2D cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat shading, and vibrant, high-contrast colors, warm beige #EAD5A0 court background, bright magenta #D81155 basketball hoop with net mid-swish, glowing blue #5CB3FF ball trail arcing through the hoop, top-center score reading '12' with hearts indicator and 3X combo multiplier burst, magenta VS banner at top edge, on-screen text 'just one quick game…' in bold white sans-serif with black outline, no human characters, pure gameplay HUD fidelity matching Flappy Dunk IP

Flappy Dunk gameplay storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, 2D cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat shading, and vibrant, high-contrast colors, split-screen VS matchmaking moment on beige #EAD5A0 background, two score columns separated by a magenta #D81155 lightning bolt divider, blue #5CB3FF accent rings around player avatars (game's existing ball-character style, no invented humans), hearts row showing 1 life left, combo explosion particles, on-screen text '3X COMBO 🔥' in chunky magenta letters with thick black outline, authentic Flappy Dunk UI chrome

Flappy Dunk victory end-card frame, aspect 9:16, 2D cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat shading, and vibrant, high-contrast colors, beige #EAD5A0 backdrop with magenta #D81155 confetti and blue #5CB3FF sparkles, large hoop in center with ball frozen mid-swish through net, scoreboard showing WIN in magenta banner, on-screen text 'your turn' in bold white outlined letters above a pulsing blue Play Free button, no human figures, faithful to Flappy Dunk's hypercasual arcade HUD
